description: MCP server for LibreNMS network monitoring - query devices, ports, alerts, and manage infrastructure
name: io.github.mhajder/librenms-mcp

environmentVariables.description: LibreNMS API token with appropriate permissions
environmentVariables.name: LIBRENMS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Verify TLS certificates for LibreNMS requests (true/false)
environmentVariables.name: LIBRENMS_VERIFY_SSL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP timeout for LibreNMS API requests in seconds
environmentVariables.name: LIBRENMS_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Enable read-only mode to block write operations
environmentVariables.name: READ_ONLY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool tags to disable (e.g., alerts,bills)
environmentVariables.name: DISABLED_TAGS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum requests allowed per rate-limit window
environmentVariables.name: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token for HTTP transport authentication
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: MCP transport type (http for HTTP, stdio for stdio)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

title: LibreNMS MCP
